text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp ends in the blink of an eye.
Bamboo Memory was so happy it started that she
was brought to tears. And now...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Gah! I just can't believe summer camp is really
over! I'm stunned!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But still! I can't be hung up on it forever! Isn't that
right, Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
The Sprinters Stakes is just around the corner!
OHHH! I'm getting all fired up!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! Would it be okay if I run back to the
academy?!
choice_data_list: Let's follow the rules and take the bus!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: You're right! Let's take the bus!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Sprinters Stakes is almost here! Bamboo
Memory suppresses the urge to show off the
results of her summer camp training and heads
home by bus!
